name: Brownie Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Blend the butter and cream cheese together until smooth.
3. Gradually add flour, forming a ball.
4. Chill for 1 hour.
5. Press into 36 greased miniature muffin tins and set aside.
6. Beat eggs well. Add salt and sugar, mixing thoroughly.
7. Stir in chocolate chips, pecans, and coffee liqueur.
8. Spoon batter into each pastry shell.
9. Bake for 20 minutes.
